titleStmt.title: SII 41.113: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 113. (A.R. No. 112 of 1905.) Maṉṉārkōyil, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Gōpālaśvamin temple at Maṉṉārkōil.

summary.p: This registers an order of the Chōḻa king while he was staying in his palace at Kāñchipuram making the veḷḷānvagai village of Piñchanūr, with its kāṇikkaḍan of 3340 kalam, as tax-free dēvadāna of the temple of Rājēndrachōḻa-viṇṇagar founded by the Chēra king Rājasimhan at Rājarāja-chaturvēdimangalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu from the fifteenth regnal year of his son (the Chōḻa-pāṇḍya viceroy at Madurai) Sundarachōḻa-pāṇḍiyan. The gift village was in Kuṟumaḍai-nāḍu in Muḍikoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu of Rājarāja-pāṇḍi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . yāṇṭu Irupattu nālāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟorupatteṭṭiṉāl pūrvatecamumum kaṅkaiyumkaṭāramuṅkoṇṭakopparakecaripaṉmmarāṉauṭaiyārśrīrājentira coḻatevar kaccipurattukoyiliṉuḷḷāl tirumaṇṭapattu Irājentracoḻapiramātirājaṉiltiruvamutuceytaruḷāviruntuirācarācappāṇṭi nāṭṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭukkuṟumaṭaināṭṭupiñcaṉūrveḷḷāṉvakaiyilmuta lāyvarukiṟapaṭinampiḷḷaikaḷilcun=taracoḻapāṇṭiyaṉukku yāṇṭu patiṉañcāvatu mutal tavirntu kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu mūvāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu ṉāṟpatiṉkalaṉey Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyu
m kācu nāṉūṟṟu muppattu mūṉṟēy kālēy Araikkāṇiyum muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷi nāṭṭu Irājarājac caturvetimaṅkalattu ceramāṉār Irājasimhaneṭuppiccairājentracoḻaviṇṇakaratte ṭunivan=taṅkaḷukkuiṟuppatākanampiḷḷaikaḷilcun=taracoḻapāṇṭiyaṉukku yāṇṭu patiṉañcāvatu mutal tevatāṉamāka variyiliṭṭu kuṭukkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Eṉṟu tirumantrira Ōlai Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalakkūṟṟattu mummuṭi coḻanallūr kiḻavaṉ ciṅkāṉai mummuṭiccoḻaṉ Eḻuttiṉālum tirumantrira Ōlaināyakam kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻapurattu Irājaviccātirapperun=teruvil cōṉakaṉ cāvūṟp parañcōti
āṉa Irājēntrira cōḻatn=tiruvap peraiyaṉum kṣattiriya cikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu Iṭippuliyūruṭaiyāṉ kovaṉāccaṉāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaaṇimurināṭāḷvāṉumuyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭuveṇ ṇāṭṭukeraḷānta timaṅkalattu narākkaṇmārāyaṉ Arumoḻiyāṉa Uttamacōḻabrahmamarāyaṉum Innāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu tuḻāruṭaiyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉ Eṭuttapātamāṉa Uttamacoḻakoṉ Oppiṉālum pukun=ta keḷvi variyiliṭṭu koḷka veṉṟu Uyya
koṇṭa vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭukeraḷān=takaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu nārakkaṇmārāyaṉ jaṉaṉātaṉāṉa Irājēn=taracōḻa brahmātarācar Ēva Ivar Ēviṉa paṭiyē Atikārikaḷ Uyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu māṉan=ta kiḻār māṟaṉ maṉnālaiyāṉa nittaviṉo
ta mūven=taveḷārum Ēva puravari tiṇaikkaḷattu kaṇkāṇi kṣattiriya cikāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭu Ira
tiru niṟaiyūr nāṭṭu cempiyanallūruṭaiyāṉ niṉṟāṉ paṭṭaṉum Irā[jā]śraya va
ḷa nāṭṭu vaṭavaḻi nāṭṭu tiruveḷḷaṟai Uṭaiyāṉ tiruvākki Ātittaṉum puravari ti
ṇaikkaḷam nitta viṉōta vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇik kūṟṟattu puliyūr kiḻavaṉ tikai Ūraṉ cotiviḷakkum Innāṭṭu kiḻāṟk kūṟṟattu piramapalak kuṭaiyāṉ kaṇavati mup
puḷḷiyum muka veṭṭi Arumoḻi tēva vaḷanāṭṭu maṅkala nāṭṭu maṅkalaṅkiḻāṉ pittaṉ picaṅkaṉum varipottaka kaṇakku jayaṅkoṇṭa cōḻamaṇṭalattu puli
yūrk koṭṭattu kuṉṟattūr cekkiḻāṉ nācakaṉ vītiyum variyiliṭu puṟakkuṭaiyāṉ nu(ṅ)kāviti paṭṭaṉum paṭṭolai Arumoḻi teva vaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nā
ṭṭu kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉ paṭukaṉ tevaṉum tevatāṉam variyiliṭuvitta puravari tiṇaikkaḷam puliyūr kiḻavaṉum pirampalak kuṭaiyāṉum vācittāṉ varipo
ttaka kaṇakku cekkiḻāṉum variyiṭṭāṉ terippu Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu
neṉmali nāṭṭu koṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ pukaḻaṉ kovintaṉum paṭṭōlai kuḻalū
ruṭaiyāṉum Iruntu yāṇṭu patiṉeḻāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟaiympattu nāliṉāl Irāja
rājap pāṇṭināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻa vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟumaṭai nāṭṭup piñcaṉūr ve
ḷḷāṉ vakaiyil mutalāy varukiṉṟapaṭi yāṇṭu patiṉañcāvatu mutal tavirntu Ivvūr nilaṉ
Eḻupatteṭṭey Oṉ(m)patu mākkāṇiyiṉālk kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu mūvāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu nā
ṟpatiṉ kalaṉey Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum kācu nāṉūṟṟu muppattu mūṉṟey kāleyaraikkāṇi
muṭi koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷi nāṭṭu Irājarājaccaturveti maṅkalattu ceramāṉ Irājasimhaṉ E
ṭuppitta Irājen=tira coḻa viṇṇakarat tevarkku veṇṭu nivan=taṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka yāṇṭu pati(ṉai)ñcāvatu mu
tal tevatāṉamāka variyiliṭṭatu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷa nācakam puliyūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari
tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam pirampalakkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
